sub_modules.qgemm_fp32_quant: Combinational FP32 to unsigned quantized integer conversion using Q15 scale and zero-point with rounding and saturation.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational integer GEMM engine that subtracts zero-points and accumulates INT32 dot products.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequant: Combinational dequantization stage that converts INT32 accumulators back to FP32 using the product of Q15 scales.
